mainEntity.name: What costs $5,000-$20,000 for AI search optimization packages in New York?
mainEntity.text: What costs $5,000-$20,000 for AI search optimization packages in New York?

acceptedAnswer.text: Entry-level NY GEO packages ($5k-$10k) cover audits and schema; full-service ($15k-$20k+) includes content creation, monitoring 10+ AIs, and quarterly reports tailored to NY regulations.

suggestedAnswer.text: NY agencies charge based on firm size; budget $10k initial for diagnostics and setup, $2k/month ongoing. ROI via 20-50% lead increase. Compare vendors via Clutch reviews; negotiate for NY Bar compliance audits to avoid hidden ethics fees.

name: AI Optimization Costs for New York Law Firms
